title: API Rate Limiting Updates

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I wanted to announce that our team has decided to rollback the recent API complexity limit change of 10X the per-minute rate every 10 minutes (i.e. 50 million every 10 minutes).

As of today, our complexity limits are:

  • 5 million per query
  • 10 million per minute
  • 100 million per 10 minutes

We want to thank everyone who submitted their feedback and for communicating your experiences. Our team is here to listen to any and all of them.

We will continue to review the way in which we let our users know of future product releases and updates.

Thank you for your commitment to monday.com and your continued feedback!

Warmly,
Helen
